title: CloudDash Refund Policy
content:
CloudDash strives for customer satisfaction and maintains a transparent refund policy for all subscription tiers.

14-Day Money-Back Guarantee: New customers subscribing to Starter or Pro plans are eligible for a full refund within 14 days of their initial purchase if they are unsatisfied with the platform. This applies to the first payment only, not renewals. To request a refund under this guarantee, contact billing@clouddash.io with your organization ID and reason for cancellation. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method.

Annual Plan Refunds: If you cancel an annual plan after the 14-day guarantee period, CloudDash does not provide prorated refunds for unused months. Your subscription remains active until the end of the paid annual term. You may downgrade to Starter at renewal rather than canceling mid-term.

Monthly Plan Cancellation: Monthly subscriptions can be canceled at any time from Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refund is issued for the partial month, but you retain access until the period ends.

Enterprise Plan Refunds: Governed by the Master Service Agreement (MSA) signed at contract initiation. Standard Enterprise contracts include a 30-day satisfaction period. Refund terms for multi-year contracts are negotiated individually.

Billing Errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a CloudDash system error (duplicate charge, wrong plan tier, or charge after confirmed cancellation), contact support immediately. Verified billing errors are refunded in full within 3 business days regardless of the standard policy window.

Chargebacks: Initiating a chargeback without first contacting CloudDash support may result in immediate account suspension. We encourage customers to reach out to resolve billing disputes before involving their bank.
